name: lynx
description: LYNX — Code Analysis & Exploration with Semantic Architecture Reasoning. A codebase intelligence MCP server with persistent memory and narrative explanations.

scripts.bundle: npm run build && node scripts/fix-pkg-deps.js && node scripts/build-native-extractor.js && pkg dist/cli.js --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/bin/lynx
scripts.bundle:all: npm run build && node scripts/fix-pkg-deps.js && node scripts/build-native-extractor.js && pkg dist/cli.js --targets node20-macos-arm64,node20-macos-x64,node20-linux-x64,node20-linux-arm64,node20-win-x64 --output dist/bin/lynx
